display_text: Warlock Aghanim's Scepter: Calls 2 Golems instead of one. This upgrade counters high-ground defense and split-push strategies by doubling the hero's summon pressure, forcing enemies to deal with multiple high-HP units or lose structures.
search_text: Warlock Aghanim Scepter double golems summon pressure high-ground defense split-push counter

display_text: Warlock Aghanim's Shard: Increases the power of all imps summoned by Warlock. This upgrade counters low-HP backline heroes and supports by enhancing the zoning and harassment potential of imps, making them a persistent nuisance in teamfights.
search_text: Warlock Aghanim Shard imp buff backline harassment zoning support counter
